name: Busy Day Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onions.
2. Drain excess fat from the beef.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (mixed vegetables, tomatoes, tomato sauce, barley, sugar, and water) to the pot.
4. Cook for at least 1 hour until all flavors are well combined.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste before serving.
MAKES ALOT!!!
